sources: Malaria Atlas Project (admin-2 prevalence) — committed snapshot
_meta.license: Original sources are public-domain or CC-BY; snapshot redistributed per source license. CC-BY-4.0.
_meta.purpose: Static snapshot for MAITRI-Gemma hackathon demo. The Retrieval Agent treats this as the climate-health context for any case in Saharsa district.

heat.advisory_summary_en: Extreme heat conditions; pregnant women in T2/T3 should avoid afternoon outdoor exposure; symptoms of dehydration and pre-eclampsia (headache, swelling, vision changes) require urgent triage.

dengue.advisory_en: Sporadic dengue activity. Pregnant women presenting with fever ≥ 38°C plus rash, body-ache, or eye pain should be referred for testing within 24h.

malaria.advisory_en: Low Plasmodium falciparum prevalence; routine ITN counselling sufficient for ANC visits.

air_quality.advisory_en: PM2.5 elevated; advise indoor cooking ventilation and avoiding biomass smoke for pregnant women.
